name: Robert Hansen
why_notable: One of the most influential web security researchers of the 2000s. Created fierce.pl (2006) — the first DNS brute-force and zone transfer tool, the direct ancestor of modern subdomain enumeration. Ran ha.ckers.org, the central web security forum before Twitter existed. Co-coined 'clickjacking' with Jeremiah Grossman (2008). Wrote Slowloris (2009) — the HTTP DoS tool that exposed Apache's thread exhaustion model. His XSS filter evasion cheat sheet is still referenced by OWASP today.
